listing.title: Tiny Acid Jam: 303 Groovebox
listing.subtitle: 808, 909, house in your pocket
listing.promotionalText: Two 303s, an 808 and a 909 in your pocket. Tap out a squelchy acid line, program a beat, ride the filter for the drop. The whole rack, no cables, no nonsense.
listing.description:
Cut & resonance, you know you want it.

A pocket acid house machine, for you never know when.

Two 303-style bass synths, a booming 808 and a housey 909, all locked to the one transport. Squelchy acid line (using the real diode-ladder filter), glides, accents, ties, the whole lot. And the Devil Fish mod you can turn on and off.

Program beats on the 808 and/or the 909, swing, distortion, reverb sends. And in the master panel you can do extra filtering, the PCF, or bitcrush and gate.

No mic, no gear, no accounts. The whole groovebox is in the app.

Made by one person who wanted an acid box to mess about with on the couch. No ads, no tracking. You buy it, you own it.
